title: How Much Does a Diesel Truck OBD Test Cost? Complete Guide to CARB Emissions Testing Prices in California
description: A complete breakdown of Clean Truck Check OBD and smoke opacity testing costs in California, including fleet discounts and what to expect.
excerpt: Understanding CARB Clean Truck Check pricing helps fleet owners budget for compliance. Here's what OBD and J1667 smoke opacity testing actually costs in Northern California.

title: Is CARB Clean Truck Check Testing Required Four Times This Year?
description: Clarifying CARB Clean Truck Check testing frequency requirements for heavy-duty diesel fleets in California.
excerpt: Fleet owners often ask how frequently they need CARB emissions testing. We break down the current HD I/M program requirements and deadlines.

title: Mobile Clean Truck Check Near Stockton: On-Site Emissions Testing for San Joaquin County Fleets
description: On-site CARB emissions testing for Stockton and San Joaquin County fleets. No travel to testing stations required.
excerpt: San Joaquin County fleets can now get mobile Clean Truck Check testing at their depot — saving hours of drive time and keeping trucks on the road.

title: Smoke Opacity Test Oakland: J1667 Certified Mobile Testing for East Bay Diesel Trucks
description: J1667 smoke opacity testing for pre-2013 diesel engines in Oakland and the East Bay. Mobile certified testing at your location.
excerpt: Pre-2013 diesel engines require SAE J1667 smoke opacity testing. NorCal CARB Mobile brings certified J1667 testing to East Bay fleets.
